lessons_learned: Agent timeout hard failures were removed by deterministic fallback routing.
Approval-loop behavior still over-plans some execution-intended turns.
Session-scoped rerun resolution improved error clarity and prevented cross-session leakage.
remediation_applied: Fallback to deterministic router when agent returns AGENT_TIMEOUT/AGENT_ERROR.
Use session-local run ledger for bio_rerun and bio_diff_runs latest/prior resolution.
Return explicit rerun error message when target run cannot be resolved.
